name: gemini.models.generate_content
description: Gemini call with `config.system_instruction`. Shape grounded in a real `gemini-flash-latest` capture (2026-05-19) — every text part carries `thought_signature` in v1beta, and `usage_metadata` includes `thoughts_token_count` / `service_tier` / `prompt_tokens_details`. Renderer surfaces system_instruction as a collapsed system message above the contents.

config.system_instruction: You are a professional French translator. Respond with only the translation, no commentary.
